title: Sadeness (Part I)
meaning_summary: Sadeness (Part I) keeps earning because its chant-driven atmosphere remains instantly recognizable and still fits mood, ambient-pop, and nostalgia listening.
revenue_drivers: Global catalog playlists keep the song in long-tail circulation.
Its distinctive atmosphere helps it stand out in ambient and retro-pop discovery.
The song's cinematic, sample-heavy identity supports ongoing sync-style value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from international streaming, catalog replay value, and licensing-style utility, using creator-favorable studio-project economics.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between original label-side rights and creator royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears concentrated around songwriter and producer-side interests
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
